title: Build bee-context-locking: extract bee-exploring step 5 (Context Assembly) into a shared CONTEXT.md-writing skill (D8), lock and park modes
action: Create skills/bee-context-locking/SKILL.md (D11 name) with two modes: lock (write/refresh CONTEXT.md from a caller's resolved decisions, D8/D9 -- extracted from skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md step 5: template render, deferred-ideas backlog rows, fresh-eyes review) and park (write evidence into CONTEXT.md Outstanding Questions per D5, plus flip docs/backlog.md Status to parked per D13, same commit -- the contract bee-qualifying's step 4b.2 already forward-declares). Precedent: skills/bee-briefing/SKILL.md (renders from truth artifacts, never originates, never presents a gate). Copy skills/bee-exploring/references/context-template.md into skills/bee-context-locking/references/context-template.md verbatim (shared template, D8). Render Claude/Codex projections via the onboarding sync (node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply --json), not a hand-copy.

truths: skills/bee-context-locking/SKILL.md exists with lock and park modes clearly separated, each ending in a Return-to-caller step, never a gate presentation
lock mode covers: template render from context-template.md, deferred-ideas-to-backlog-rows, fresh-eyes review -- extracted faithfully from bee-exploring step 5
park mode covers: brief into Outstanding Questions (reusing the existing section, D5), Status:parked write to docs/backlog.md (D13), same-commit framing
Rendered .claude/skills/bee-context-locking/SKILL.md and .agents/skills/bee-context-locking/SKILL.md exist with the reference file mirrored
Hard Gates state the single-writer rule (D8) and the never-originate rule (mirrors bee-briefing)
prohibitions: Do not modify skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md or skills/bee-qualifying/SKILL.md in this cell (slice 3's job)
Do not have bee-context-locking present or self-approve any gate
Do not invent a new park-brief file format
Do not hand-write the .claude/.agents projections -- must come from the onboarding sync

verify: test -f skills/bee-context-locking/SKILL.md && test -f skills/bee-context-locking/references/context-template.md && test -f .claude/skills/bee-context-locking/SKILL.md && test -f .agents/skills/bee-context-locking/SKILL.md && grep -q 'parked' skills/bee-context-locking/SKILL.md && grep -q 'Never present a gate' skills/bee-context-locking/SKILL.md
